decisions.decision: GSD config: quality profile, research ON, plan_check ON, verifier ON, auto-advance ON, UI phase ON, nyquist ON, skip_discuss ON, per-phase branching
decisions.rationale: User demands AAA quality. Research ON for Context7 integration. Skip discuss in autonomous for known toolkit phases.

decisions.decision: CLAUDE.md deduplication approach: strip tool reference docs (lines 25-314) that duplicate MCP server instructions, keep only project structure + workflow rules + planning refs (~40 lines)
decisions.rationale: MCP servers already inject tool docs via system-reminder. CLAUDE.md duplication wastes ~5,500 tokens/turn.

decisions.decision: Research agent set to ON (user corrected OFF recommendation)
decisions.rationale: User wants Context7 integration and thorough research. Quality over token savings.

decisions.decision: All HIGH-priority tools to be integrated: Context7, zai analyze_image, zai ui_diff_check, zai diagnose_error_screenshot, web-search-prime, web-reader
decisions.rationale: User explicitly wants everything except LOW impact items
Same settings for all future projects

decisions.decision: Agent skill injection configured — .claude/skills/vb-mcp-tools/SKILL.md injected into executor, planner, researcher, verifier, UI researcher, debugger
decisions.rationale: GSD subagents need to know about 37 MCP tools to make correct decisions

decisions.decision: Frontend-design skill bridged to Unity UI Toolkit — design thinking applies but output targets UXML/USS/C#/PrimeTween
decisions.rationale: Skill's design quality boost is valuable but needs Unity implementation, not web

decisions.decision: Hugging Face noted as potentially slow — will research alternative fast 3D APIs to avoid Hugging Face bottlenecks
decisions.rationale: User feedback about performance impact. Need fast alternatives for v4.0 architecture.

decisions.decision: Context7 tested and working — Unity 6 / URP 17.3 / PrimeTween docs accessible via resolve-library-id
decisions.rationale: User said Context7 is HUGE for Unity docs. Integration confirmed: Unity 6.0.1 (6.1), URP 17.3 features, PrimeTween 85 snippets with async/await patterns.

decisions.decision: Alternative 3D AI pipelines researched — Tripo (already have), Fal AI (very fast), Meshy (fast), CSM.AI (fast), Kaiber/Luma/Krea (web browser), Hunyuan3D-2GP (8GB local), SD 1.5B (4-8GB). Recommendation: Combine geometry nodes + Tripo for hero assets only.
decisions.rationale: Hugging Face slow bottleneck documented. Multiple fast alternatives identified for v4.0 architecture.

decisions.decision: zai analyze_image tested — Blender connection works, screenshot workflow functional, but zai server rejected Claude image URL format (HTTP 400). Needs local file path or different URL format for reliable visual QA.
decisions.rationale: Workflow tested: blender_scene inspect, blender_object create/delete, blender_viewport screenshot, zai MCP connection. URL format issue identified as blocker for contact_sheet workflow.

decisions.decision: Codebase map created for VeilBreakers3DCurrent — Unity 6.x URP project documented with all major systems (Managers, AI, Audio, VFX, UI, Data, Assets). Integration with MCP toolkit workflow documented.
decisions.rationale: Comprehensive map covers: project structure, script organization, key systems (19 managers), technologies (URP 17.3, PrimeTween, Cinemachine), and integration patterns. Ready for v4.0 planning.

decisions.decision: Meta-optimization session complete — All 7 tasks finished. Token efficiency achieved (~5,500 tokens/turn saved), Context7 integrated, 3D AI alternatives researched, codebase mapped, memory pruned and organized.
decisions.rationale: Ready to commit changes and continue with v6.0 work or new milestone planning.

next_action: Commit optimization session changes: git add + git commit. Then decide: continue v6.0 phases or plan new milestone.
